title: The Loofah Louie Show
description: Kids’ Opinion Award winner. The adventures of Louie, Amos, and Lottie are funny and relatable. It will crack you up. The most hysterical of all the cartoon characters!
quote: How ’bout a game of pop the water balloon?
altHero: Louie, a loofah, Amos, a fish, and Lottie, a mouse, splashing in a puddle
alt1: Amos and Lottie playing corn hole with a bomb
alt2: Louie standing on the corn hole board next to the bomb
alt3: Louie pumping a water pump into Amos’ mouth as he blows up full of water
alt4: Now Louie is taking on water from the pump and he is so huge and water is starting to leak out of him
